name: tbc-bis-app
description: TBC Classic Best in Slot Guide

scripts.refresh-pvp: node scraper/fetch-leaderboard.js && node scraper/fetch-gear.js --top 200 && node scraper/analyze-gear.js && node -e "const d=require('./scraper/output/pvp-bis-data.json');require('fs').writeFileSync('js/pvp-data.js','const PVP_DATA='+JSON.stringify(d)+';')" && node fetch-icons.js
scripts.refresh-and-deploy: npm run refresh-pvp && npm run deploy
scripts.prerender: python3 -m http.server 8080 & sleep 2 && node scraper/prerender.js; kill %1
scripts.prerender-and-deploy: npm run prerender && npm run deploy
